handler.query: SELECT ifNull(ResourceAttributes['k8s.object.name'], '') AS obj_name, ifNull(ResourceAttributes['k8s.namespace.name'], '') AS obj_namespace, ifNull(ResourceAttributes['k8s.object.uid'], '') AS obj_uid, ifNull(ResourceAttributes['k8s.object.kind'], '') AS obj_kind, ifNull(ResourceAttributes['k8s.event.reason'], '') AS reason, ifNull(Body, '') AS message, multiIf( SeverityText IN ('WARN', 'WARNING', 'ERROR', 'FATAL'), 'Warning', 'Normal' ) AS type, formatDateTime(toDateTime(Timestamp), '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%SZ', 'UTC') AS eventTime, ifNull(ResourceAttributes['k8s.event.source.component'], '') AS source_component FROM otel_logs WHERE ResourceAttributes['krateo.composition.id'] = {composition_id:String} AND ResourceAttributes['k8s.event.reason'] != '' ORDER BY Timestamp DESC LIMIT 50 FORMAT JSON
